$comment: Diffract universal tool registry. Each entry defines a third-party CLI the agent can use. INSTALL fields (repo/ref/kind/patch/build/entry/bin) are consumed at image-build time by install-diffract-tools.sh to bake the tool into /sandbox/.diffract-tools/<name> and put <bin> on the agent PATH. CONNECT fields (secretEnv/configEnv/apiHosts/binaries/authHeader) are consumed at runtime by diffract-tool-connect.sh to wire the tool's credentials securely (OpenShell generic provider -> placeholder in sandbox -> real secret injected at egress; egress allowlisted to apiHosts, attributed to binaries). 'patch' is an optional shell command run after clone and before build, in the tool dir — use it for proxy-compat fixups (the sandbox routes egress through an MITM proxy; node tools must use undici/fetch, so an axios tool needs adapter:'fetch'). Add a tool = add an entry here; no Dockerfile edit.
